description: A customer has requested an increase in their credit limit. The credit manager needs to review their account to make a decision.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the customer's payment history for the last 24 months.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent gets the customer's payment history, noting their average days-to-pay.

nodes.task_description: Run a credit report on the customer from a third-party credit agency (e.g., Dun & Bradstreet).

expected_outcome.expected: Agent retrieves the customer's latest credit score and report.

nodes.task_description: Based on the positive payment history and strong credit score, approve the credit limit increase.
Update the customer's credit limit in the master file.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully updates the credit limit in the system.
